title: Make your Spanish less literal
subtitle: Use Spanish chunks instead of word-for-word English.
overview: B1 is where literal translation starts to limit you.
Learn common Spanish ways to phrase ideas.

items.es: Me cuesta hablar cuando estoy nervioso.
items.en: It is hard for me to speak when I am nervous.

items.es: Se me da bien aprender con ejemplos.
items.en: I am good at learning with examples.

items.es: El viernes me viene bien para la reunión.
items.en: Friday works for me for the meeting.

items.es: Aunque requiere tiempo, vale la pena.
items.en: Although it requires time, it is worth it.
